title: 4 Drawer Small Rattan Tower Unit - CREAM, Single Unit - 38.5cm (H) x 19cm (W) x 26cm (D)
features: Introducing our Small Plastic Rattan Drawer Units – the perfect blend of style, functionality, and compact design. Organize your space with these versatile drawers, available in an array of chic colors to suit your aesthetic.

Choose from sophisticated Black, modern Grey, classic Cream, or earthy Mushroom to complement your decor. These small plastic rattan drawer units are not just practical; they're a stylish addition to any room.

With approximate dimensions of 38.5cm (H) x 19cm (W) x 26cm (D), these drawers strike the ideal balance between ample storage space and a space-saving footprint. Fit them seamlessly into any corner of your bedroom or bathroom.

The drawers feature a matte finish for a contemporary touch, while the front showcases a meticulously molded rattan design. It's the perfect marriage of modern simplicity and classic elegance, adding a touch of sophistication to your storage solutions.

Choose the perfect configuration for your needs. Our small plastic rattan drawer units are available for individual purchase, allowing you to customize your storage. For unbeatable value, opt for our sets of 2 or 4 drawers – providing a cohesive and stylish storage solution for any space.
